name: Shanxi Lanhua Sci-Tech Venture Co.,Ltd
summary: Shanxi Lanhua Sci-Tech Venture Co.,Ltd engages in the production and sale of coal. It also offers chemical products comprising urea, fertilizer products, caprolactam products, dimethyl ether, and methanol. Shanxi Lanhua Sci-Tech Venture Co.,Ltd was founded in 1998 and is based in Jincheng, China.
